verses.latin_vulgate: Dormivit autem Abia cum patribus suis, et sepelierunt eum in civitate David : regnavitque Asa filius ejus pro eo, in cujus diebus quievit terra annis decem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁכַּ֨ב אֲבִיָּ֜ה עִם־אֲבֹתָ֗יו וַיִּקְבְּר֤וּ אֹתוֹ֙ בְּעִ֣יר דָּוִ֔יד וַיִּמְלֹ֛ךְ אָסָ֥א בְנ֖וֹ תַּחְתָּ֑יו בְּיָמָ֛יו שָׁקְטָ֥ה הָאָ֖רֶץ עֶ֥שֶׂר שָׁנִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Abia slept with his fathers, and they buried him in the city of David: an Asa his son reigned in his stead: in his days the land was quiet ten years.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Abia nukkui isäinsä kanssa ja he hautasivat hänen Davidin kaupunkiin; ja Asa hänen poikansa tuli kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa. Hänen aikanansa oli maa levossa kymmenen ajastaikaa.
verses.king_james: So Abijah slept with his fathers, and they buried him in the city of David: and Asa his son reigned in his stead. In his days the land was quiet ten years.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit autem Asa quod bonum et placitum erat in conspectu Dei sui, et subvertit altaria peregrini cultus, et excelsa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֤עַשׂ אָסָא֙ הַטּ֣וֹב וְהַיָּשָׁ֔ר בְּעֵינֵ֖י יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Asa did that which was good and pleasing in the sight of his God, and he destroyed the altars of foreign worship, and the high places.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Asa teki sitä mikä hyvä ja oikia oli Herran hänen Jumalansa edessä,
verses.king_james: And Asa did that which was good and right in the eyes of the Lord his God:

verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֛סַר אֶת־מִזְבְּח֥וֹת הַנֵּכָ֖ר וְהַבָּמ֑וֹת וַיְשַׁבֵּר֙ אֶת־הַמַּצֵּב֔וֹת וַיְגַדַּ֖ע אֶת־הָאֲשֵׁרִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And broke the statues, and cut down the groves.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja otti vieraat alttarit pois ja korkeudet, ja rikkoi patsaat, ja maahan hakkasi metsistöt,
verses.king_james: For he took away the altars of the strange gods, and the high places, and brake down the images, and cut down the groves:

verses.latin_vulgate: et præcepit Judæ ut quæreret Dominum Deum patrum suorum, et faceret legem, et universa mandata :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֙אמֶר֙ לִֽיהוּדָ֔ה לִדְר֕וֹשׁ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֣י אֲבוֹתֵיהֶ֑ם וְלַעֲשׂ֖וֹת הַתּוֹרָ֥ה וְהַמִּצְוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he commanded Juda to seek the Lord the God of their fathers, and to do the law, and all the commandments.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi Juudalle, että he etsisivät Herraa, isäinsä Jumalaa, ja tekisivät lain ja käskyn jälkeen.
verses.king_james: And commanded Judah to seek the Lord God of their fathers, and to do the law and the commandment.

verses.latin_vulgate: et abstulit de cunctis urbibus Juda aras et fana, et regnavit in pace.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֙סַר֙ מִכׇּל־עָרֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֔ה אֶת־הַבָּמ֖וֹת וְאֶת־הַחַמָּנִ֑ים וַתִּשְׁקֹ֥ט הַמַּמְלָכָ֖ה לְפָנָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he took away out of all the cities of Juda the altars, and temples, and reigned in peace.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän otti pois korkeudet ja epäjumalat kaikista Juudan kaupungeista; ja valtakunta oli levossa hänen allansa.
verses.king_james: Also he took away out of all the cities of Judah the high places and the images: and the kingdom was quiet before him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ædificavit quoque urbes munitas in Juda, quia quietus erat, et nulla temporibus ejus bella surrexerant, pacem Domino largiente.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּ֛בֶן עָרֵ֥י מְצוּרָ֖ה בִּֽיהוּדָ֑ה כִּֽי־שָׁקְטָ֣ה הָאָ֗רֶץ וְאֵין־עִמּ֤וֹ מִלְחָמָה֙ בַּשָּׁנִ֣ים הָאֵ֔לֶּה כִּֽי־הֵנִ֥יחַ יְהֹוָ֖ה לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He built also strong cities in Juda, for he was quiet, and there had no wars risen in his time, the Lord giving peace.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän rakensi vahvat kaupungit Juudassa; sillä maa oli levossa, ja ei ollut sotaa häntä vastaan niinä vuosina; sillä Herra antoi hänelle levon.
verses.king_james: And he built fenced cities in Judah: for the land had rest, and he had no war in those years; because the Lord had given him rest.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit autem Judæ : Ædificemus civitates istas, et vallemus muris, et roboremus turribus, et portis, et seris, donec a bellis quieta sunt omnia, eo quod quæsierimus Dominum Deum patrum nostrorum, et dederit nobis pacem per gyrum. Ædificaverunt igitur, et nullum in exstruendo impedimentum fuit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר לִיהוּדָ֜ה נִבְנֶ֣ה ׀ אֶת־הֶעָרִ֣ים הָאֵ֗לֶּה וְנָסֵ֨ב חוֹמָ֣ה וּמִגְדָּלִים֮ דְּלָתַ֣יִם וּבְרִיחִים֒ עוֹדֶ֨נּוּ הָאָ֜רֶץ לְפָנֵ֗ינוּ כִּ֤י דָרַ֙שְׁנוּ֙ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵ֔ינוּ דָּרַ֕שְׁנוּ וַיָּ֥נַֽח־לָ֖נוּ מִסָּבִ֑יב וַיִּבְנ֖וּ וַיַּצְלִֽיחוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to Juda: Let us build these cities, and compass them with walls, and fortify them with towers, and gates, and bars, while all is quiet from wars, because we have sought the Lord the God of our fathers, and he hath given us peace round about. So they built, and there was no hinderance in building.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän sanoi Juudalle: rakentakaamme nämät kaupungit, ja tehkäämme muurit niiden ympäri, ja tornit, ja portit, ja salvat, niin kauvan kuin maa on meidän edessämme; sillä me olemme etsineet Herraa meidän Jumalaamme, häntä me olemme etsineet, ja hän on antanut meille levon jo joka taholta. Niin he rakensivat, ja se menestyi.
verses.king_james: Therefore he said unto Judah, Let us build these cities, and make about them walls, and towers, gates, and bars, while the land is yet before us; because we have sought the Lord our God, we have sought him, and he hath given us rest on every side. So they built and prospered.

verses.latin_vulgate: Habuit autem Asa in exercitu suo portantium scuta et hastas de Juda trecenta millia, de Benjamin vero scutariorum et sagittariorum ducenta octoginta millia : omnes isti viri fortissimi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֣י לְאָסָ֗א חַ֘יִל֮ נֹשֵׂ֣א צִנָּ֣ה וָרֹ֒מַח֒ מִֽיהוּדָה֙ שְׁלֹ֣שׁ מֵא֣וֹת אֶ֔לֶף {ס} וּמִבִּנְיָמִ֗ן נֹשְׂאֵ֤י מָגֵן֙ וְדֹ֣רְכֵי קֶ֔שֶׁת מָאתַ֥יִם וּשְׁמוֹנִ֖ים אָ֑לֶף כׇּל־אֵ֖לֶּה גִּבּ֥וֹרֵי חָֽיִל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Asa had in his army of men that bore shields and spears of Juda three hundred thousand, and of Benjamin that bore shields and drew bows, two hundred and eighty thousand, all these were most valiant men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Asalla oli suuri sotajoukko, jotka kantoivat kilpiä ja keihäitä: Juudasta kolmesataa tuhatta, ja BenJaminista, jotka kilpiä kantoivat ja joutsia jännittivät, kaksisataa ja kahdeksankymmentä tuhatta. Ja nämät olivat kaikki väkevät sotamiehet.
verses.king_james: And Asa had an army of men that bare targets and spears, out of Judah three hundred thousand; and out of Benjamin, that bare shields and drew bows, two hundred and fourscore thousand: all these were mighty men of valour.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressus est autem contra eos Zara Æthiops cum exercitu suo, decies centena millia, et curribus trecentis : et venit usque Maresa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵ֨א אֲלֵיהֶ֜ם זֶ֣רַח הַכּוּשִׁ֗י בְּחַ֙יִל֙ אֶ֣לֶף אֲלָפִ֔ים וּמַרְכָּב֖וֹת שְׁלֹ֣שׁ מֵא֑וֹת וַיָּבֹ֖א עַד־מָרֵשָֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Zara the Ethiopian came out against them with his army of ten hundred thousand men, and with three hundred chariots: and he came as far as Maresa.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Sera Etiopialainen meni heitä vastaan suuren sotajoukon kanssa, jossa oli kymmenen kertaa satatuhatta miestä ja kolmesataa vaunua, ja tuli Maresaan asti.
verses.king_james: And there came out against them Zerah the Ethiopian with an host of a thousand thousand, and three hundred chariots; and came unto Mareshah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Asa perrexit obviam ei, et instruxit aciem ad bellum in valle Sephata, quæ est juxta Maresa :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵ֥א אָסָ֖א לְפָנָ֑יו וַיַּֽעַרְכוּ֙ מִלְחָמָ֔ה בְּגֵ֥יא צְפַ֖תָה לְמָרֵשָֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Asa went out to meet him, and set his army in array for battle in the vale of Sephata, which is near Maresa:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Asa meni häntä vastaan. Ja he hankitsivat sotimaan Zephatan laaksossa Maresan tykönä.
verses.king_james: Then Asa went out against him, and they set the battle in array in the valley of Zephathah at Mareshah.

verses.latin_vulgate: et invocavit Dominum Deum, et ait : Domine, non est apud te ulla distantia, utrum in paucis auxilieris, an in pluribus. Adjuva nos, Domine Deus noster : in te enim, et in tuo nomine habentes fiduciam, venimus contra hanc multitudinem. Domine, Deus noster tu es : non prævaleat contra te homo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרָ֨א אָסָ֜א אֶל־יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהָיו֮ וַיֹּאמַר֒ יְהֹוָ֗ה אֵֽין־עִמְּךָ֤ לַעְזֹר֙ בֵּ֥ין רַב֙ לְאֵ֣ין כֹּ֔חַ עׇזְרֵ֜נוּ יְהֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהֵ֙ינוּ֙ כִּֽי־עָלֶ֣יךָ נִשְׁעַ֔נּוּ וּבְשִׁמְךָ֣ בָ֔אנוּ עַל־הֶהָמ֖וֹן הַזֶּ֑ה יְהֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהֵ֙ינוּ֙ אַ֔תָּה אַל־יַעְצֹ֥ר עִמְּךָ֖ אֱנֽוֹשׁ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And he called upon the Lord God, and said: Lord, there is no difference with thee, whether thou help with few, or with many: help us, O Lord our God: for with confidence in thee, and in thy name we are come against this multitude. O Lord thou art our God, let not man prevail against thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Asa huusi Herran Jumalansa tykö ja sanoi: Herra! et sinä väliä pidä auttaissas monen kautta, taikka kussa ei yhtäkään voimaa ole. Auta meitä, Herra meidän Jumalamme! sillä me turvaamme sinuun, ja olemme tulleet sinun nimees tätä suurta joukkoa vastaan; sinä olet Herra meidän Jumalamme, ei yksikään ihminen voi mitään sinua vastaan.
verses.king_james: And Asa cried unto the Lord his God, and said, Lord, it is nothing with thee to help, whether with many, or with them that have no power: help us, O Lord our God; for we rest on thee, and in thy name we go against this multitude. O Lord, thou art our God; let not man prevail against thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exterruit itaque Dominus Æthiopes coram Asa et Juda : fugeruntque Æthiopes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּגֹּ֤ף יְהֹוָה֙ אֶת־הַכּוּשִׁ֔ים לִפְנֵ֥י אָסָ֖א וְלִפְנֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֑ה וַיָּנֻ֖סוּ הַכּוּשִֽׁים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord terrified the Ethiopians before Asa and Juda: and the Ethiopians fled.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra löi Etiopialaisia Asan ja Juudan edessä, niin että Etiopialaiset pakenivat.
verses.king_james: So the Lord smote the Ethiopians before Asa, and before Judah; and the Ethiopians fled.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et persecutus est eos Asa, et populus qui cum eo erat, usque Gerara : et ruerunt Æthiopes usque ad internecionem, quia Domino cædente contriti sunt, et exercitu illius præliante. Tulerunt ergo spolia multa,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּרְדְּפֵ֨ם אָסָ֜א וְהָעָ֣ם אֲשֶׁר־עִמּוֹ֮ עַד־לִגְרָר֒ וַיִּפֹּ֤ל מִכּוּשִׁים֙ לְאֵ֣ין לָהֶ֣ם מִֽחְיָ֔ה כִּֽי־נִשְׁבְּר֥וּ לִפְנֵי־יְהֹוָ֖ה וְלִפְנֵ֣י מַחֲנֵ֑הוּ וַיִּשְׂא֥וּ שָׁלָ֖ל הַרְבֵּ֥ה מְאֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Asa and the people that were with him pursued them to Gerara: and the Ethiopians fell even to utter destruction, for the Lord slew them, and his army fought against them, and they were destroyed. And they took abundance of spoils,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Asa ja hänen väkensä, jotka olivat hänen kanssansa, ajoivat heitä Gerariin asti takaa. Ja Etiopialaiset kaatuivat, niin ettei yhtään heistä eläväksi jäänyt, vaan he tapettiin Herran ja hänen sotaväkensä edessä. Ja he veivät sieltä paljon saalista.
verses.king_james: And Asa and the people that were with him pursued them unto Gerar: and the Ethiopians were overthrown, that they could not recover themselves; for they were destroyed before the Lord, and before his host; and they carried away very much spoil.

verses.latin_vulgate: et percusserunt civitates omnes per circuitum Geraræ : grandis quippe cunctos terror invaserat : et diripuerunt urbes, et multam prædam asportaverunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּכּ֗וּ אֵ֤ת כׇּל־הֶעָרִים֙ סְבִיב֣וֹת גְּרָ֔ר כִּי־הָיָ֥ה פַחַד־יְהֹוָ֖ה עֲלֵיהֶ֑ם וַיָּבֹ֙זּוּ֙ אֶת־כׇּל־הֶ֣עָרִ֔ים כִּֽי־בִזָּ֥ה רַבָּ֖ה הָיְתָ֥ה בָהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they took all the cities round about Gerara: for a great fear was come upon all men: and they pillaged the cities, and carried off much booty.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he löivät kaikki kaupungit Gerarin ympäriltä maahan; sillä Herran pelko tuli heidän päällensä. Ja he ryöstivät kaikki kaupungit; sillä niissä oli paljo saalista.
verses.king_james: And they smote all the cities round about Gerar; for the fear of the Lord came upon them: and they spoiled all the cities; for there was exceeding much spoil in them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et caulas ovium destruentes, tulerunt pecorum infinitam multitudinem, et camelorum : reversique sunt in Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַם־אׇהֳלֵ֥י מִקְנֶ֖ה הִכּ֑וּ וַיִּשְׁבּ֨וּ צֹ֤אן לָרֹב֙ וּגְמַלִּ֔ים וַיָּשֻׁ֖בוּ יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And they destroyed the sheepcotes, and took an infinite number of cattle, and of camels: and returned to Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he löivät navetat maahan, ja veivät ylen paljon lampaita ja kameleja, ja tulivat jälleen Jerusalemiin.
verses.king_james: They smote also the tents of cattle, and carried away sheep and camels in abundance, and returned to Jerusalem.
